title: GitHub Proof Solution Marketplace Allocation Policy

one_of_ninety_nine.meaning: A declared 1-of-99 solution-edition policy. No token, sale, royalty, entitlement, or contract deployment is claimed by this declaration alone.

jaywisdom_eth.meaning: Identity and research-anchor allocation declaration only.

jaywisdom_base_eth.meaning: Cryptographic-control and operational-control proof domains remain equally represented and independently verified.

zora_profile.meaning: Public discovery and free-access surface declaration; no mint or marketplace state is asserted.

required_before_value_transfer: EOA recovery or ERC-1271 validation succeeds
payment processor or smart-contract rail explicitly configured

boundaries: GitHub Marketplace listing does not prove wallet control.
Wallet control does not prove GitHub Marketplace approval.
A percentage declaration is not an executed payout.
A 1-of-99 declaration is not evidence of token issuance or sale.
A Zora profile URL does not prove a free mint or active listing.
No automated value transfer is enabled by this file.
